children.text: shall be deemed to be a local distribution facility within the meaning of section 1(b) of the Natural Gas Act (); and15 U.S.C. 717(b)
shall not be subject to the jurisdiction of the Commission.

children.heading: Additional pipelines
children.label: b Additional pipelines
children.text: Except as provided in , nothing in this chapter shall preclude or otherwise affect a future natural gas pipeline that may be constructed to deliver natural gas to Fairbanks, Anchorage, Matanuska-Susitna Valley, or the Kenai peninsula or Valdez or any other site in the State for consumption within or distribution outside the State.section 720a(d) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In accordance with the Natural Gas Act [ et seq.], the Commission shall establish rates for the transportation of natural gas on any Alaska natural gas transportation project.15 U.S.C. 717

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: 2 Consultation
children.text: In carrying out paragraph (1), the Commission, in accordance with section 17(b) of the Natural Gas Act (), shall consult with the State regarding rates (including rate settlements) applicable to natural gas transported on and delivered from the Alaska natural gas transportation project for use within the State.15 U.S.C. 717p(b)
